name: Impossible Peaches and Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
3-1/2 cups sliced fresh peaches may be substituted.
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Pat peach slices dry, and place them in the plate.
4. Sprinkle with cinnamon and nutmeg; toss.
5. Spread evenly in the plate.
6. Beat remaining ingredients except Streusel and sweetened whipped cream until smooth (15 seconds in a blender on high).
7. Pour into the plate.
8. Sprinkle with Streusel.
9. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, 40-45 minutes.
10. Top each serving with whipped cream.
Streusel:
1. Cut butter into Bisquick and sugar until crumbly; stir in almonds.
